soccerCodes.title: Build A Soccer Squad Codes
soccerCodes.subtitle: Track active codes, expired codes, upcoming code events, and the safest reward sources for Build A Soccer Squad.
soccerCodes.intro: Build A Soccer Squad is still focused on squad building, Cup Mode, quests, and collection rewards. The public Roblox page currently lists update rewards, quest rewards, and an upcoming code-related event, but no public redeem code string is listed for players to copy yet.

items.label: Active Codes
items.value: No public active code strings listed
items.details: The official Roblox game description does not list a redeemable code string at this time.

items.label: Expired Codes
items.details: No expired Build A Soccer Squad code list is published on the official Roblox game page or Bloxheed community page.

items.label: Upcoming Code Event
items.details: The Roblox event panel shows a Double Rewards and Codes event tied to the game, making the official Roblox page the first place to check before using any pasted code list.

items.label: Quest Rewards
items.details: The Cup update states that quests now give Rerolls and Refreshes, so quests are the current direct reward path.

items.label: Group and Favorite Rewards
items.value: Bloxheed group updates and in-game rewards
items.details: The official description asks players to like, favorite, and join the group for better updates, more content, and in-game rewards.

items.label: 2X Rewards Pass
items.value: Doubles quests, team completion rewards, and Cup game rewards
items.details: The Cup update lists 2X Rewards as a pass that doubles quest rewards, rewards from completing teams, and rewards from winning Cup games.

beginnerGuide.title: Build A Soccer Squad Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic loop: roll players, build a 4-3-3 squad, raise team OVR, and work toward Cup Mode.
beginnerGuide.intro: Build A Soccer Squad is a Roblox football card collector by Bloxheed. The core goal is to collect players from different eras, build the strongest possible team, improve your OVR, and unlock higher-value card types through Captains, Prime players, and Cup rewards.

steps.title: Open the official Roblox game
steps.goal: Start from the Bloxheed experience page
steps.description: Use the official Roblox page for the correct Build A Soccer Squad experience. Like, favorite, and join the Bloxheed group before grinding, because the game description links group activity with updates and in-game rewards.

steps.title: Roll players and fill your squad
steps.description: The beginner loop is to roll footballers, fill the Starting XI, and keep upgrading weak positions. The game advertises more than 1,000 players from 1970 to today.

steps.title: Prioritize Squad OVR
steps.goal: Push toward a stronger Best Team
steps.description: Your early progress should focus on raising total team strength, not just collecting random high-rated cards. A balanced squad with strong positions matters more than one flashy pull surrounded by weak cards.

steps.title: Pick one 2026 squad target
steps.description: The Prime and Captains update says that completing the entirety of select 2026 squads unlocks that squad's 99 OVR Captain. Focus one collection path first instead of spreading progress across too many teams.

steps.title: Use quests for rerolls and refreshes
steps.goal: Improve bad rolls without wasting resources
steps.description: The Cup update adds Rerolls and Refreshes from quests. Save them for weak slots, bad position fits, or final upgrades that block your next OVR target.

steps.title: Prepare for Cup Mode
steps.description: Cup Mode requires a team rated 93 OVR or higher. Treat 93 OVR as the first major progression wall, then start pushing for Cup wins and 105+ OVR Cup cards.

tierList.title: Build A Soccer Squad Tier List
tierList.subtitle: A practical tier list based on known OVR ceilings, unlock paths, and progression value.
tierList.intro: The strongest Build A Soccer Squad targets are not just random high-rated cards. Cup cards, Prime players, Captains, and useful chemistry fillers each matter at different stages, because Cup Mode has a strict 93 OVR entry gate and 105+ OVR rewards sit behind Cup wins.

tiers.name: Cup Players
tiers.obtain: Win 5 Cups after entering Cup Mode
tiers.details: Cup Players are the highest listed reward tier in the current Cup update. They should be treated as the top long-term target once your team can enter Cup Mode.

tiers.name: Prime Players
tiers.details: The Prime update lists 20 Prime players available in the hourly shop. Use Prime players to replace weak Starting XI slots and push toward the 93 OVR Cup gate.

tiers.name: Captain Players
tiers.obtain: Complete the entirety of select 2026 squads
tiers.details: Captains are a major reward for finishing full 2026 squad collections. They are reliable anchors before Prime and Cup cards take over the highest OVR slots.

tiers.name: Premium Captains
tiers.details: The Cup update adds Premium Captains tied to select 2002 team completion. These are worth targeting when the collection path matches your squad-building plan.

tiers.name: High-Value Regular and 2026 Squad Cards
tiers.obtain: Rolls, shop offers, and team collection progress
tiers.details: Regular cards still matter when they improve a weak position, help finish a 2026 squad, or push your total OVR closer to Cup Mode.

tiers.name: Low-OVR or Poor-Fit Filler Cards
tiers.details: Use these cards only to complete your Starting XI. Replace them once you roll a stronger position fit, Captain target, Prime upgrade, or Cup-ready card.

cupModeGuide.title: Build A Soccer Squad Cup Mode Guide
cupModeGuide.subtitle: Cup Mode is the first major endgame gate: reach 93 OVR, enter tournaments, win Cups, and unlock 105+ OVR Cup cards.
cupModeGuide.intro: The Cup update adds tournament progression to Build A Soccer Squad. Players need a 93 OVR or higher team to enter, then they can compete for Cup wins, Cup Players, Premium Captains, and boosted reward paths.

stages.details: The official update states that your team must be 93 OVR or higher to join a Cup.
Cup Mode uses your strongest squad in a tournament format. The goal is to compete and win the Cup.
After winning 5 Cups, players can unlock 105+ OVR Cup standout cards.
The Cup update adds Premium Captains as a collection reward for select 2002 teams.
Quests now give Rerolls and Refreshes, helping players improve weak positions while preparing for Cup Mode.

stages.reward: Doubled quest, team completion, and Cup game rewards
stages.details: The 2X Rewards Pass doubles quests, rewards from completing teams, and rewards from winning Cup games.
The Cup update adds a podium that displays the Top 3 Best Teams.

squadRatingCalculator.title: Build A Soccer Squad OVR Calculator
squadRatingCalculator.subtitle: Use your starting lineup ratings to see how close your team is to the Cup requirement. Focus upgrades on weak starting positions before spending resources on bench depth.
squadRatingCalculator.intro: Cup Mode requires a squad rating of 93 OVR or higher, so the fastest upgrade path is simple: check your starting lineup, find the lowest-rated positions, then replace those slots with stronger cards from Captains, Prime players, Cup players, shop purchases, quests, rerolls, and refreshes.

inputs.label: Cup Entry Target
inputs.description: Your squad must be 93 OVR or higher to enter Cup Mode.

inputs.label: Cup Standout Goal
inputs.description: After winning 5 cups, players can unlock 105+ OVR Cup standout cards.

inputs.label: Main Calculator Inputs
inputs.description: Enter the OVR shown on each starting player card, then sort the lineup from lowest to highest to find the best upgrade targets.

inputs.label: Upgrade Priority
inputs.description: A high-rated card improves your squad most when it replaces a weak starting position. Prime players, Captains, Premium Captains, Legends, and Cup cards are the main high-OVR upgrade paths.

inputs.label: Position Planning
inputs.value: Fix the lineup before the collection
inputs.description: Use shop purchases, rerolls, refreshes, and quests to fill weak positions instead of collecting strong cards that do not improve your active squad.

captainsGuide.title: Build A Soccer Squad Captains Guide
captainsGuide.subtitle: Captains are collection-based upgrades tied to completing specific squads. They are best treated as long-term roster goals rather than random side rewards.
captainsGuide.intro: Build A Soccer Squad uses team completion as a major progression path. Select 2026 squads can unlock 99 OVR Captains, while Premium Captains are tied to completing select 2002 teams. Before spending rerolls or refreshes, choose one target squad and finish missing players one by one, because half-finished teams do not unlock the captain reward.

unlocks.requirement: Collect the entirety of a select 2026 squad.
unlocks.use: Best for players building around one modern squad and pushing toward stronger starting-lineup upgrades.
Best for players using the 2002 World Cup Teams path as a premium collection route.

unlocks.requirement: Buy, roll, or earn missing players until the required squad is complete.
unlocks.use: Use Daily Shop purchases and refreshes to fill missing slots instead of chasing unrelated high-OVR cards.

unlocks.requirement: Purchasing or completing a quest for a player unlocks that character to be rolled as a rare player variant.
unlocks.use: Useful after you target specific players for squad completion or long-term collection value.

primePlayersGuide.title: Build A Soccer Squad Prime Players Guide
primePlayersGuide.subtitle: Prime players are the main 100+ OVR chase outside Cup standout cards. Watch the Hourly Shop, use the Daily Shop for team progress, and avoid wasting refreshes on players that do not improve your lineup.
primePlayersGuide.intro: The Prime update added 20 100+ OVR Prime players to the Hourly Shop, while the Daily Shop supports 2026 team purchases. For fast squad growth, use Prime cards for immediate OVR jumps and shop purchases for Captain progress.

players.title: Prime Players
players.description: Prime players are high-rating cards available through the Hourly Shop and are useful for immediate starting-lineup upgrades.

players.title: Hourly Shop
players.description: Check the Hourly Shop for 100+ OVR Prime player purchases before spending resources on random upgrades.

players.title: Daily Shop
players.description: The Daily Shop includes 2026 team purchases, making it useful for filling missing squad slots and working toward Captain unlocks.

players.title: Rare Player Variants
players.description: Purchasing or completing a quest for a player unlocks that character to be rolled as a rare player variant.

players.title: Cup Standout Cards
players.description: After winning 5 cups, players can unlock 105+ OVR Cup standout cards, which sit above Prime cards in raw rating.

players.title: Large Player Pool
players.description: The game features more than 1000 collectible players from 1970 to today, so shop targeting matters more than random collecting.

rerollsAndRefreshes.title: Build A Soccer Squad Rerolls Refreshes and Rewards
rerollsAndRefreshes.subtitle: Rerolls and Refreshes are core tools for improving your squad and filling collection gaps. Spend them around clear goals: Captain progress, Prime upgrades, Cup entry, or rare variant access.
rerollsAndRefreshes.intro: Build A Soccer Squad now gives Rerolls and Refreshes through quests, supports bulk shop purchases, and includes a 2X Rewards pass that boosts quest rewards, team completion rewards, and Cup game rewards. Use resources with a target squad in mind, because random refreshes rarely move a squad forward.

resources.name: Rerolls
resources.use: Chase better player results and rare variants.
resources.timing: Use after choosing a target squad, position gap, or high-OVR upgrade goal.

resources.name: Refreshes
resources.use: Refresh available player or shop options.
resources.timing: Use when the shop can help finish a team, fill a weak lineup slot, or support Captain progress.

resources.name: Quests
resources.use: Earn Rerolls and Refreshes, and unlock player access through quest completion.
resources.timing: Prioritize quests tied to players or resources that match your current squad plan.

resources.name: 2X Rewards Pass
resources.use: Doubles quests and rewards from completing teams and winning Cup games.
resources.timing: Most useful when farming quests, finishing multiple teams, or repeatedly playing Cup Mode.

resources.name: Team Completion Rewards
resources.use: Progress toward Captain unlocks and reward payouts.
resources.timing: Focus on one team at a time so each purchase or roll moves you closer to a real unlock.

resources.name: Cup Game Rewards
resources.use: Earn Cup-related rewards and progress toward 105+ OVR Cup standout unlocks.
resources.timing: Start farming after your squad reaches the 93 OVR Cup requirement.

resources.name: Group Rewards
resources.use: Join the group for updates, more content, and in-game rewards.
resources.timing: Claim before serious progression so you do not miss easy early value.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Build A Soccer Squad

questions.question: Does Build A Soccer Squad have redeem codes right now?
questions.answer: The official Roblox page for Build A Soccer Squad does not list a public redeem code string yet, but it does tease a Double Rewards and Codes event. Always check the official Roblox page first, because quest rewards, group rewards, and the 2X Rewards pass are the active reward paths today.

questions.question: How do I enter Cup Mode in Build A Soccer Squad?
questions.answer: Build A Soccer Squad requires a squad rated 93 OVR or higher to enter Cup Mode. Once you pass the 93 OVR gate, you can compete in tournaments for Cup wins, Premium Captains, and 105+ OVR Cup standout cards after 5 Cup wins.

questions.question: What is the highest OVR in Build A Soccer Squad?
questions.answer: The highest listed card tier in Build A Soccer Squad is the 105+ OVR Cup standout cards unlocked after winning 5 Cups. Below that sit 100+ OVR Prime players in the Hourly Shop and 99 OVR Captains from completing select 2026 squads.

questions.question: How do I unlock Captains in Build A Soccer Squad?
questions.answer: Build A Soccer Squad rewards Captains through squad completion. Collecting the entirety of a select 2026 squad unlocks a 99 OVR Captain, while Premium Captains come from completing select 2002 teams. Focus one squad at a time, because half-finished teams do not unlock the captain.

questions.question: Where can I play Build A Soccer Squad?
questions.answer: Build A Soccer Squad is a Roblox experience published by Bloxheed. You can play it through the official Roblox game page on any device that supports Roblox, and joining the Bloxheed community group links you to updates and in-game rewards.

questions.question: What are Prime players in Build A Soccer Squad?
questions.answer: Prime players in Build A Soccer Squad are 100+ OVR cards added by the Prime update. There are 20 Prime players rotating through the Hourly Shop, and they are the fastest mid-game upgrade for pushing your Starting XI toward the 93 OVR Cup entry gate.
